case_title: BERTHA SWAN VS. THE CALIFORNIA ASSOCIATION FOR HEALTH EDUCATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWAN, BERTHA AS TO DEFENDANT THE CALIFORNIA ASSOCIATION FOR HEALTH EDUCATION EMPLOYMENT AND DIGNITY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA CAHEED INFANT DAYCARE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SWAN, BERTHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE CALIFORNIA ASSOCIATION FOR HEALTH EDUCATION EMPLOYMENT AND DIGNITY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA CAHEED INFANT DAYCARE $5,294.55 PRINCIPAL, $56.10 INTEREST, $135.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,485.95, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
